gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Supporter' AND T1.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(b.Id) 
FROM badges b
JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE b.Name = 'Supporter'
AND u.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65;
question: How many adults who obtained the badge Supporter?
